overall.description: Game engine footage from a maritime ship simulator, showing a first-person view from the bridge of a vessel navigating coastal waters during a stormy night. The scene features functional navigation displays including a rotating radar, moving map, and data readouts, with the ship moving steadily through dark waters until a lightning flash briefly illuminates the scene.

events.description: bright lightning flash briefly illuminates the bridge interior and ocean surface

agents.ego_description: operating the ship from the bridge, monitoring navigation displays while moving through coastal waters

entered.detail: digital chart display showing coastal map with ship position marker
circular radar screen with rotating sweep arm showing surrounding waters
blue data readout screen showing ship systems information
red-painted forward deck of the ship with railings and equipment
metal safety railing on the left side of the bridge view
metal safety railing on the right side of the bridge view
dark choppy water extending to the horizon

segments.scene_description: View from a ship's bridge during stormy night navigation. The camera faces forward over the bow through large windows, with three navigation monitors visible overhead. The ship moves steadily through dark waters while the radar sweep rotates continuously. The interior is dimly lit with a cool blue-grey color palette.

agents.ego_description: continuing navigation through coastal waters, maintaining course after the lightning strike

segments.scene_description: Continued steady navigation from the ship bridge following the lightning flash. The scene returns to the previous low-light conditions with the radar continuing its sweep and the ship maintaining forward motion through the dark coastal waters. No significant changes in the environment or ship systems are visible.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person perspective from a ship's bridge as it navigates through a dark, stormy coastal environment. It begins with a view over the bow through large windows, where the interior is bathed in a cool blue-grey light and three navigation monitors display a continuously rotating radar sweep. As the vessel maintains its steady forward motion through the dark waters, a sudden flash of lightning briefly illuminates the exterior scene. The environment then returns to its previous low-light conditions, with the camera remaining fixed as the ship continues its journey under the dim glow of the bridge instruments.
